sets.name: Basic Master Set
sets.summary: 100+ core questions covering Python syntax, collections, files, testing, HTTP, automation, and ML fundamentals.

sets.name: Fresher Interview Set
sets.summary: Interview-style fresher questions synthesized into one static quiz set with right/wrong checking.

sets.name: Intermediate Master Set
sets.summary: 100+ practical questions covering Python application structure, APIs, databases, testing, async, automation, and data workflows.

sets.name: Intermediate Interview Set
sets.summary: Interview-style mid-level set focused on implementation choices, API design, testing, and optimization.

sets.name: Advanced Master Set
sets.summary: 100+ advanced questions covering concurrency, APIs, databases, resilience, observability, AI systems, and deployment.

sets.name: Senior Interview Set
sets.summary: Hard interview set for senior-level design, tradeoffs, reliability, performance, and AI/system thinking.

sets.name: Automation
sets.summary: Scripting pipelines, CLI design, scheduling, idempotency, retries, and file workflows.

sets.name: Backend and Data
sets.summary: APIs, validation, SQL, transactions, ORM usage, caching, and service design basics.

sets.name: AI and Machine Learning
sets.summary: Model evaluation, embeddings, inference patterns, data leakage, RAG, and prompt reliability.

sets.name: System Design
sets.summary: Queues, idempotency, observability, failure isolation, scaling, and delivery tradeoffs.

sets.name: Bilingual VI/EN
sets.summary: Vietnamese and English interview prompts for searching and learning in both languages.
